pipelineVersion.title: Pipeline Version
pipelineVersion.description: The version of the pipeline definition

pipelineExecutionId.title: Execution ID
pipelineExecutionId.description: The unique identifier for the pipeline execution

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the pipeline execution

statusSummary.title: Status Summary
statusSummary.description: A summary of the status of the pipeline execution

executionMode.title: Execution Mode
executionMode.description: The execution mode for this pipeline execution

trigger.description: The trigger that caused the pipeline execution

artifactRevisions.description: A list of source code revisions for the pipeline execution

variables.title: Variables
variables.description: Variables defined for the pipeline execution

lastUpdateTime.title: Last Update Time
lastUpdateTime.description: The time when the pipeline execution was last updated

startTime.title: StartTime
startTime.description: The time when the pipeline execution started
